imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Circular badge logo with 'KOP DE GOA' text arc at the top, a yellow/golden sun glow background, a dark navy blue beer mug with foam in the center, a red outer ring border, and a white inner ring — the entire image must have a fully transparent background with no square or rectangular box (kopdeGoa-logo.dim_300x300.png)

existing_features.title: Update all logo usages across the app (Header, Hero, Footer) so the logo is displayed without any surrounding dark square/box background — the circular badge should appear directly on whatever background sits behind it, with no rectangular container or box shape visible.

projectName: Remove outer box/square background from logo image
